overview.description: The Virtus Duff & Phelps Real Estate Income ETF (DPRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund takes a multi-asset approach to providing global exposure to real estate investment trusts (REITs). It typically invests between 60% to 80% in equity securities and between 20% to 40% in debt obligations or preferred securities. DPRE was launched on Apr 14, 2026 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.
